themes.label: Obedience

Commentary leans on "This day the LORD thy God hath commanded thee to do these statutes and judgments —Moses trans...". Word-study detail reinforces "מִצְוֹתָֽיו׃: all his commandments - a command, whether human or divine (collectively, the law)".
